sql_array: INSERT INTO test_timestamps (event_time) SELECT * FROM generate_series(TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-01 00:00:00', TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-01 01:00:00', INTERVAL '15 minute');
UPDATE test_timestamps SET event_time = event_time + INTERVAL '1 hour' WHERE event_time < TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-01 01:00:00';
SELECT event_time FROM test_timestamps WHERE event_time BETWEEN TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-01 00:00:00' AND TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-01 00:45:00';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_timestamps WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-01 00:30:00';
